feedback.text: I have been following the Stop Killing Games movement for a while now and am quite a big advocate for it. I have been playing games for my whole life and don't plan on stopping any time soon, especially revisiting those I've played since my childhood. If this Act were to include video games as well, it would go hand in hand with the Stop Killing Games initiative, and protect the gamers and consumers of video game media from losing content we have paid for due to unwilling and/or greedy developers. Just a thought to make this Act even better for EU consumers.
